cells.data:
# Server Macros

These are processed via PHP on the server.

```
// Global Text 
%cmsText(cmsId)%
%cmsText(cmsId,{options:true})% // With optional options JSON dictionary

// Object Property as Text 
%cmsText(collection,property)%
%cmsText(collection,property,{options:true})% // With optional options JSON dictionary

// Object Property + ID as Text 
%cmsText(collection,id,property)%
%cmsText(collection,id,property,{options:true})% // With optional options JSON dictionary
```



# Browser Macros

These are processed with JS asynchronously after the page has loaded

```
// Global Text
<cms type="text" id="header"></cms>

// Object Property as Text 
<cms type="text" collection="products" prop="name" options=""></cms>

// Object Property as Image
<cms type="image" collection="products" prop="icon" options=""></cms>

```
